scenes.text: You wake up in a strange place. Traveler, tell me your name.
scenes.action: function() { var playerName = prompt('Enter your name:'); if (playerName) { localStorage.setItem('PlayerName', playerName); alert('Player name saved: ' + playerName); } }

scenes.text: You fall back asleep and miss the adventure.
The door creaks open, revealing a dark hallway.
You decide to stay put, wondering what lies beyond.
